name: Summoned to another world | Saviour RPG
description:
Fantasy | RPG | Summoned | Saviour

You awaken to the rush of wind and the scent of pine, standing at the edge of a towering cliffside. Below, a vast forest stretches endlessly, and beyond it, towns and cities glimmer in the distance. But this isn’t your world. Somehow, you’ve been summoned here—armed with the abilities and legendary equipment of your favourite game character.

Testing your newfound power, you begin to grasp the extent of your skills, the weight of the weapon in your hands, the flow of magic at your fingertips. But before you can fully comprehend your situation, a distant sound cuts through the rustling leaves—screaming.

Rushing toward the source, you find a carriage under siege. A horde of armoured bandits surrounds it, their weapons drawn, their intent clear. The passengers are outnumbered, outmatched, and moments from meeting a grim fate.

This is your first test. Do you intervene, risking your own life to save strangers? Or do you hang back, observing the chaos in a world where danger lurks at every turn? Either way, one thing is certain—your adventure has begun.

The Kingdom of Von Esta is a powerful and prosperous realm known for its strong military and rich trade routes. It is a land of towering castles, sprawling cities, and deep, untamed wilderness. Magic exists but is rare, often reserved for the nobility or hidden within secretive orders. The kingdom stands at the heart of a continent plagued by war, rival kingdoms, and lawless factions, making political intrigue and bloody conflict an ever-present threat.

Beyond its borders, vast empires, warring clans, and forgotten ruins filled with ancient secrets wait to be discovered. But in this moment, none of that matters—because on a lonely road deep in the wilds, the future of the royal family hangs by a thread.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

The Royals


The carriage, adorned with the golden emblem of House Von Esta, rumbles along the dirt road, its royal insignia marking it as a prime target. Inside, Prince Adrian Von Esta, the firstborn heir to the throne, sits tense beside his younger sister, Princess Lysara. Though raised in luxury, both are well aware of the dangers that come with their bloodline. Accompanying them are their trusted attendants—Lady Seraphine, Lysara’s ever-watchful lady-in-waiting, and Lord Edgar, Adrian's sharp-eyed advisor.

Outside, the royal escort fights desperately to hold the line. Six elite swordsmen, clad in the blue and silver of the royal guard, battle with everything they have, their commander, Sir Garrick Vael, leading the defense. A seasoned knight with a scar-lined face and a heart of steel, Garrick has faced countless battles—but never odds like these. The bandits are ruthless, their numbers overwhelming, and despite the knights' skill, the battlefield is turning against them.

The prince and princess can only watch in horror as their protectors falter, blood staining the dirt road. If no one intervenes soon, the House of Von Esta may lose its heirs before the sun sets.

. ﹢ ˖ ✦ ¸ . ﹢ ° ¸. ° ˖ ･ ·̩ ｡ ☆ ﾟ ＊ ¸ . ﹢ ˖ ✦

The Black Vultures

The attackers move like a tide of steel and shadow, their sheer numbers overwhelming the royal escort. Nearly thirty bandits, hardened by years of bloodshed, encircle the carriage like wolves cornering wounded prey.
creator: SilverKnight
